questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the condition of the traffic lane.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of a multi-track railroad ahead.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of a single-track railroad ahead.

questions.question_text: You have just passed the roadworks and are required to continue straight ahead. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I pull over to the right past the marked-out area immediately.
answers.2: I do not pull away in order to pass the marked-out area until the white lines become broken.
answers.3: I continue straight ahead across the yellow lines.
answers.4: I wait for the time being before pulling over to the right.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 60 to 70 km/h and are required to continue straight ahead. The tractor in front is moving slowly. There are no road users behind you. How will you continue?

answers.1: I give a flashing light signal with my high-beam headlights.
answers.2: I increase my speed.
answers.3: I overtake.
answers.4: I brake and remain behind the tractor for the time being.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 50 km/h in a built-up area. How will you continue?

answers.1: I increase my speed.
answers.2: I pull over as far as possible to the right of the traffic lane.
answers.3: I reduce my speed.
answers.4: I stop.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 60 to 70 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road.
answers.2: I continue at an unchanged speed of 60 to 70 km/h.
answers.3: I remain in my own traffic lane.
answers.4: I pull towards the centre of the traffic lane.

questions.question_text: How fast are you permitted to drive on this road up to the bend?

answers.1: A maximum of 80 km/h.
answers.2: A maximum of 50 km/h.
answers.3: A maximum of 40 km/h.
answers.4: A maximum of 20 km/h.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the traffic sign.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of bicyclists crossing.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of a dangerous bend in the road.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful that left turns are prohibited.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 50 km/h and are required to follow the road. What must you be particularly mindful of?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful that it may be dangerous to drive above 40 km/h through the bend.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful that it is prohibited to drive above 40 km/h through the bend.
answers.4: The maximum recommended speed through the bend is 40 km/h.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of a bit further ahead?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the merge rule where the lines end.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of the rule for changing traffic lanes where the lines end.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of traffic approaching from behind on my left side.

questions.question_text: You are required to continue straight ahead at the intersection. There are no road users behind you. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the traffic lights.
answers.2: I move into the traffic lane to the left of me.
answers.3: I continue in my own traffic lane up to the intersection.
answers.4: I am ready to stop.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful of the reduced traction.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful that I may only drive to the left.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful that I may only drive to the right.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful that I have a free choice as to whether I drive to the left or to the right.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 40 km/h, the same speed as the passenger car in front. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of the shape of the road.
answers.3: I move my foot over to the brake pedal.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of whether the passenger car in front brakes.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 50 km/h, the same speed as the passenger car in front. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 50 km/h.
answers.2: I follow the passenger car and overtake the bicyclist as well.
answers.3: I reduce my speed.
answers.4: I wait for the time being before overtaking the bicyclist.

questions.question_text: You are about to catch up with the passenger car in front. It is moving slowly at approximately 30 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I increase my speed in order to continue at 80 km/h.
answers.2: I reduce my speed.
answers.3: I remain behind the passenger car for the time being.
answers.4: I overtake immediately.

questions.question_text: You have just given a flashing light signal to overtake, and the passenger car in front suddenly pulls over to the left. How do you proceed?

answers.1: I increase my speed.
answers.2: I overtake both passenger cars immediately.
answers.3: I follow the vehicle in front and overtake immediately.
answers.4: I wait before overtaking.

questions.question_text: You are approaching an intersection with several traffic lanes. Where should you position yourself if you are required to continue straight ahead?

answers.1: In the traffic lane farthest to the left.
answers.2: In one of the two centre traffic lanes.
answers.3: In the traffic lane farthest to the right.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful of the traffic lights.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 40 km/h and are required to continue straight ahead at the intersection. How will you continue?

answers.1: I continue at an unchanged speed of approximately 40 km/h.
answers.2: I give a signal with the horn.
answers.3: I count on the bicyclist holding back.
answers.4: I hold back for the bicyclist.

questions.question_text: You intend to turn left here. What must you be particularly mindful of?

answers.1: I have a duty to give way to all traffic.
answers.2: There is priority to the right at the T-junction.
answers.3: I hold back for the passenger car coming from the left.
answers.4: The passenger car coming from the left must hold back for me.

questions.question_text: You have been drinking beer and spirits with a friend, and both of you have had too much to drink. What do you do?

answers.1: It is best if I let my friend take charge of the passenger car, since he has the most driving experience.
answers.2: It is best to leave the passenger car where it is.
answers.3: I alone have full responsibility if he drives my passenger car.
answers.4: I have equal responsibility if I let him drive my passenger car.

questions.question_text: You are driving at approximately 50 km/h. How will you continue?

answers.1: I reduce my speed.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful of children getting on and off the bus.
answers.3: I remain behind the bus and wait until it moves off before I move off myself.
answers.4: I drive around the bus immediately, but at a reduced speed.

questions.question_text: What must you be particularly mindful of in this situation?

answers.1: I am particularly mindful that the expressway is starting.
answers.2: I am particularly mindful that the motorway is starting.
answers.3: I am particularly mindful of traffic crossing ahead.
answers.4: I am particularly mindful that the motorway is coming to an end.

questions.question_text: You are driving at 80 to 90 km/h, but the truck is not giving you enough room to merge into the motorway. How will you continue?

answers.1: I increase my speed.
answers.2: I try to merge in in front of the truck.
answers.3: I reduce my speed slightly.
answers.4: I merge in behind the truck if the roadway behind is clear.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car. According to the legal provisions, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.
answers.2: Parking is permitted here.
answers.3: Stopping is prohibited here.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car. According to the legal provisions, which of the following applies here?

answers.1: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.
answers.2: Parking is permitted here.
answers.3: Stopping and parking are prohibited here.

questions.question_text: You have stepped out of the red passenger car. According to the legal provisions, which of the following apply here?

answers.1: I am permitted to stop the passenger car here for 2 to 3 minutes.
answers.2: Parking is permitted here.
